subject: english
description: 現在完了形は過去の動作・経験が現在につながることを表します。

questions.question: I ___ played games. (過去完了)
questions.explanation: 過去完了は had + 過去分詞です

questions.question: I ___ played games by next week. (未来完了)
questions.explanation: 未来完了は will have + 過去分詞です

questions.question: I ___ lived here for three years. (現在完了)
questions.explanation: 現在完了は have/has + 過去分詞です

questions.question: She ___ lived here for three years. (現在完了)
questions.explanation: 三人称単数の現在完了は has + 過去分詞です

questions.question: I ___ studied English before I came here. (過去完了)
questions.explanation: 過去完了は had + 過去分詞です

questions.question: They ___ finished the work by tomorrow. (未来完了)
questions.explanation: 未来完了は will have + 過去分詞です

questions.question: He ___ just finished homework. (現在完了)
questions.explanation: 三人称単数の現在完了は has + 過去分詞です

questions.question: We ___ been friends for ten years. (現在完了)
questions.explanation: 複数形の現在完了は have + 過去分詞です
